name: Terrorblade
description: The self-righteous shall choke on their sanctimony.

abilities.name: Dark Unity
abilities.description: Grants Terrorblade's images within the aura radius outgoing damage bonus. Proximity Radius: 1200. Damage Dealt Bonus: 60%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Reflection
abilities.description: In the fractal prison of Foulfell, Terrorblade learned the truth of this old tale: you are your own worst enemy. Now it is a lesson he teaches others. Cast Range: 700. Radius: 400. Move Speed Slow: 15%/20%/25%/30% (40%/45%/50%/55%). Attack Speed Slow: 15/20/25/30 (40/45/50/55). Debuff Duration: 5 (6). Damage Dealt: 30%/45%/60%/75% (55%/70%/85%/100%). Cooldown: 23/20/17/14. Mana Cost: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Conjure Image
abilities.description: There's only one thing more dangerous than facing Terrorblade. Facing MORE Terrorblades! Number of Illusions: 1. Damage Dealt: 20%/25%/35%/40%. Damage Taken: 250%. Duration: 34 (44). Cooldown: 50/60/70/80.

abilities.name: Metamorphosis
abilities.description: Temper, temper. The rage rises up and takes control. Meet Terrorblade's own worst self. Transform Time: 0.35. Set Base Attack Time: 1.5. Attack Damage Bonus: 20/40/60/80. Attack Range Bonus: 450/500/550/600. Duration: 35/40/45/50 (65/70/75/80). Aura Radius: 1200. Cooldown: 145/140/135/130. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Demon Zeal
abilities.description: Grants bonus health regeneration, bonus movement speed, and bonus attack speed within the radius to all affected illusions. Health Regen Bonus: 20. Move Speed Bonus: 60. Attack Speed Bonus: 100. Duration: 30. Radius: 1200. Aura Linger Duration: 0.1. Mana Cost: 60.

abilities.name: Terror Wave
abilities.description: Causes a wave to travel outwards in all directions fearing all enemy units upon impact. Max Effect Radius: 1600. Fear Duration: 2. Demon Form Duration: 15. Aura Radius: 1200. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Sunder
abilities.description: Severing the life from both Terrorblade and a target hero, exchanging a percentage of both units' current health. Some health points must remain after the exchange. Cast Range: 475. Current Health Percentage Change: 100%. Min Current Health: 35%/30%/25%. Cooldown: 110/75/40. Mana Cost: 100/75/50.
